name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

The Big Government political establishment was supposed to have this all sewn up by now.

But polls show the race for the Republican nomination for President of the United States is wide open.

And with the September 30th End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline rapidly approaching, I'm not going to mince words.

This is by far THE most critical fundraising deadline I've ever faced. PERIOD.

**[So I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE action](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623756:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r)**.

The press and the Big Government establishment of BOTH parties are already sniffing around to see if my campaign has the grassroots support and resources it will take to surge to the top of the Republican Primary polls.

They know Americans have begun to zero in on the race for the White House with the launch of the Republican debates -- and are just now digging into candidates' records and plans.

And they know this is the last FEC reporting deadline before all candidates begin their massive end of year push to 2016.

As more punches are thrown, polls will change. This massive field of 15 Republican candidates is going to quickly start whittling down to just a handful.

My campaign is laying the groundwork to surge to the top.

But it's so critical I have a strong quarter. **[So I'm counting on your support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623756:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r)**.

From the very moment I launched my candidacy for the presidency of the United States, Democrats and their pals in the press have gone all-out to SMEAR me.

It hasn't worked.

Many polls show I'm the ONLY Republican candidate to beat leading Democrat Hillary Clinton in five key swing states President Obama won in both 2008 and 2012.

We have an unmatched and growing on-the-ground presence in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

Energy is sky-high as GOP loyalists and political newcomers step forward to "Stand With Rand" and fuel an exploding volunteer base.

These patriots are seeing firsthand that my campaign is the real deal.

You see, I didn't run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because I was "next in line" or some high-powered consultant thought I'd make a great candidate.

I had a great life as a physician back home in Kentucky -- a life I was sad to let go.

But I ran for political office because I felt it was time that good people stood up and fought for the America we so dearly love. I ran because I was worried about the future of our country.

I worried that the "land of the free" is becoming the land of the regulated, taxed and spied on.

I'm running for President because I'm still worried. And I know you are too.

Today, we're $18.3 TRILLION in debt. The Middle East is spiraling out of control.

Members of BOTH parties openly sneer at the constitutional liberties that have made our nation the greatest and freest on earth.

I believe we can right the ship.

I believe we can destroy the Washington Machine and make liberty and freedom the default position in Washington, D.C. -- instead of corruption, cronyism and bigger government.

But that can only happen with your help and generous financial support.

Unlike many of my opponents, my campaign isn't funded by a bunch of Wall Street fat-cats and special interests who are looking for special deals, breaks and bailouts.

I'm not "their guy," and I never will be. I'm yours.

**[And I'm counting on you to please stand with me during this most critical time](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623756:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r)**.

I'm running for President not to "be something" or because I need an ego boost. I'm running to restore America by ushering in real, bold limited-government reforms, including:

*** CUT TAXES AND SPENDING. My Fair and Flat Tax plan will blow up the tax code and start over, return $2 TRILLION to the American people over ten years, grow our GDP by a whopping 10% and result in at least 1.4 million new jobs;

*** PASS TERM LIMITS to end the reign of career politicians in Washington, D.C. who never have to face voters in a serious election;

*** FORCE MEMBERS OF CONGRESS TO READ THE BILLS THEY VOTE ON, and stop their habit of ramming thousand-page bills into law at the last minute before anyone knows what's in them;

*** REPEAL ALL OF OBAMACARE to stop the soaring health insurance premium costs, policy cancellations, shuttered hospitals and poorer quality healthcare Americans are now experiencing;

*** AUDIT THE FEDERAL RESERVE to end the "print-now, ask-questions-later" policies that result in never-ending boom-bust economic cycles, corruption and cronyism;

*** PROTECT THE ENTIRE BILL OF RIGHTS. That means protecting our religious liberties, the right to life, political speech, our gun rights and our Fourth Amendment right to privacy from government spying.

For the first time in decades, you and I have a true chance to nominate a Republican who will take a sledgehammer to the Washington Machine.

This race could not be more wide open. So every dollar counts.

With the September 30th FEC deadline rapidly approaching, **[will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623756:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r)**?

I know it's a lot. But this is the most critical FEC deadline I've ever faced.

If it's just too much right now, **[please know whatever you can afford to contribute will help my campaign tremendously](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623756:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r)**.

This is the last FEC deadline before I begin my all-out push to 2016.

Every dollar you can give will help me pay for the critical travel bills for the campaign stops, bumper stickers, phone banks, U.S. mail, social media outreach and Internet and TV ads it will take to surge to the top.

So please give as much as you can. **[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or whatever you can afford at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623756:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r)**!

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

P.S. The September 30th End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline is rapidly approaching. This is by far THE most critical fundraising deadline I've ever faced. PERIOD.

This massive field of 15 Republican candidates is going to quickly start whittling down to just a handful.

My campaign is laying the groundwork to surge to the top, but I must be able to count on your support. **[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623756:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r)**!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623756:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623757:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623758:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623759:WUsWCMmNl:m:1:879035888:EA4A61A91F9BF7BAE974F5A7B2AAD545:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Justin Amash
subject: Who will stand?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Rand Paul and I were elected to Congress in
the same year.

While I've fought for our liberties
consistently in the U.S. House, he's stuck to his guns on the
values he campaigned on in the Senate, despite intense pressure
from the Washington Machine.

Will you join me in supporting Senator Paul
by chipping in a contribution before the September 30th deadline?

Fellow Conservative, Rand Paul has led the fight in the
Senate to knock down the central bank's wall of secrecy and
finally Audit the Fed.

He's fought to cut spending to deal with our
$18.2 trillion debt and repeal ObamaCare 100%.

And he's always stood for the Constitution
and ALL of the Bill of Rights by fighting to end the NSA's
illegal domestic spying program.

The fact is, Rand Paul has consistently
championed the values you and I share.

And that's why his candidacy matches the
moment.

Americans aren't looking for a President who
will muddy the ideological waters.

They are thirsting for a candidate who boldly
proclaims Big Government's days are numbered.

Fellow Conservative, Rand Paul has a message he can carry
to every corner of America to defeat the Washington Machine by:

>> MAKING Congress read the bills instead of
ramming thousand-page pieces of legislation through with no time
to consider the consequences;

>> CUTTING taxes for every American;

>> ENACTING a Balanced Budget Amendment to
force Congress to live within its means;

>> ENDING career politicians lording over
Washington by enacting term limits;

>> ELIMINATING Common Core.

Because he has the limited government record
in the Senate to back up his rhetoric, polls show him leading
Hillary Clinton in crucial swing states like Colorado, Iowa, and
Pennsylvania.

Rand Paul is the biggest threat to defeat
Hillary Clinton and put a stop to the Washington Machine and its
Big Government ways.

So Hillary Clinton and her allies in the
press are cranking up into full attack mode.

Rand Paul has never backed down from a fight
and, with your help, he can defeat the Washington Machine and
stop the coronation Hillary Clinton has planned.

I'm standing with him in the movement to take
our country back and I hope you will join us by chipping in your
most generous contribution right away.

dpwillis67@gmail.com

CONTRIBUTED TO END OF QUARTER PUSH?

## NO DONATION ##

Chip in $10
immediately >>

Chip in $25
immediately >>

Chip in $50
immediately >>

Chip in $100
immediately >>

Or donate another
amount >>

In Liberty,

Congressman Justin Amash (R-MI)

Peter -

Right before the debate at the Reagan Library, we were right on the verge of crossing 500,000 grassroots donations.

I asked your help, and said I would invite whoever made the 500,000th donation to join me for a day on the campaign trail. We were blown away by the response and far exceeded our goal.

**Well now we have our next big goal and because last time was so successful, we'd like to offer another donor the chance to join me on the road for a day.**

Here's how this will work. The third fundraising quarter ends on Wednesday night and we are on the verge of our biggest month ever -- **a whopping $10 million dollars raised.**

[**If you make a donation of any amount and your donation gets us to our $10 million goal, we'll fly you out to join me on the road. ****You can donate by going here right now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30635180:sGh4VMmMN:m:1:876315805:6A427E3DC1BC397DC98E31D3DB244727:r)

A $10 million month would be unprecedented for our campaign. It's astounding, particularly when you realize this is all from small donations of $10, $25 and so on.

This is truly a movement of "We the People," and together we are going to make history.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: Shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

September 30th isn't just the FEC deadline; it's also the last day before an impending government shutdown.

Pat Toomey has repeatedly voted to defund Planned Parenthood and now our government is stuck in gridlock because his allies in Congress are willing to **shut down the government** in order to take accessible and affordable health care away from millions of people.

Toomey's spent years in Congress voting _against_ the interests of Pennsylvania families and _for_ the extreme positions of his special interest allies. But we can right this ship.

**[Can you pitch in $10 today and help us hold Pat Toomey accountable before our big deadline on September 30th?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3969981246859116544/-5552074124408389632?refcode=e20150926u&amount=15) We still need to raise $7,744 more to reach our grassroots fundraising goal. **

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3969981246859116544/-5552074124408389632?refcode=e20150926u&amount=15)
---

As Deputy Campaign Manager, I can tell you that early donations are vital. Each small gift gets our campaign one step closer to building an infrastructure that can take on and beat Pat Toomey. Special interests have already spent $2 million to save Toomey's seat. We need every dollar we can get **right now** so we can stay competitive.

**If you 've been waiting to invest in this campaign, please consider making a donation to own a piece of this incredible effort.** You'll be a part not only of the campaign that elected Pennsylvania's first woman Senator, but also of the movement that sent an advocate for families and women's rights to Washington.

**[Katie needs you now more than ever. Donate $10 today and help us hit our goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3969981246859116544/-5552074124408389632?refcode=e20150926u&amount=15)**

Thanks for your support,

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3969981246859116544/-5552074124408389632?refcode=e20150926u&amount=15)
---

subject: Can I count on you, Fellow Conservative?

body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

The media doesn't get it. The establishment of BOTH parties still don't understand.

But the American people are angry.

In fact, last month polls showed the American people's trust in government is at an all-time low. Half of Americans see government as a threat to their liberty. 75% see government as corrupt to the core!

While the Big Government establishment has nothing to offer but the status quo, I'm offering real change -- and a real return to constitutional principles.

Fellow Conservative, with the media and the establishment breathing down my neck, **[will you please agree to a generous contribution of $20.16 or more IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30638825:sFdFDMmNt:m:1:879035888:405F7206AD012C1DCD1DB8E35D03ABB3:r)**?

The truth is, this FEC End of Quarter Fundraising Period is by far the most important of my campaign. Reporters and members of BOTH parties are already sniffing around to see what kind of grassroots strength I'm building.

A big fundraising quarter for me will help show the Big Government establishment their days are numbered!

**[So won't you please give as generously as you can to help send this message](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30638825:sFdFDMmNt:m:1:879035888:405F7206AD012C1DCD1DB8E35D03ABB3:r)**?

The truth is, the race the establishment was supposed to have all wrapped up by now is anyone's race.

With the recent announcement of House Speaker John Boehner's resignation, the D.C. insiders are up in arms wondering which direction our Republican Party should go.

Should we opt for more of the same?

Should we put our trust in charlatans who will tickle our ears only to give us nothing but the status quo?

Or should we boldly and unabashedly stand for our principles, take the fight to President Obama and stand for what we believe in?

Fellow Conservative, fakes, phonies and faux conservatives won't dig our country out of $18.3 TRILLION in debt.

They won't restore our Bill of Rights.

They won't take our nation anywhere but nosediving off a cliff!

I'm running for President because our nation is in danger. We're in danger of losing our soul.

In danger of losing our belief that a nation works best when free people are left alone to live their lives as they see fit -- out from the watchful eye of some government bureaucrat.

That's why, if elected, I'll slash taxes.

I'll cut spending.

I'll protect our Bill of Rights.

I'll defund Planned Parenthood.

I'll force the politicians to actually read the bills they vote on and stop corruption by greedy insiders looking to profit off of taxpayers' hard-earned dollars.

I'll restore a pro-American foreign policy and finally secure our borders.

And I'll clean house in Washington, D.C. by imposing term limits on Congress, which will finally send the career politicians packing.

Let's see how they like actually working for a living for a change under the heavy hand of government they've created for the rest of us!

But Fellow Conservative, with the September 30th fundraising quarter right around the corner, I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE support.

**[So please give your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30638825:sFdFDMmNt:m:1:879035888:405F7206AD012C1DCD1DB8E35D03ABB3:r)**!

name: Jeb Bush
subject: The world will see this
body:
Friend,

This is the most important email I've sent to supporters since we launched the campaign, so I'm going to cut right to the chase.

**We 're only 4 days away from filing our quarterly fundraising report. This report will be posted for the world to see and as I'm writing this email, we're still short of our goal of $200,000 for the month.**

[**I need your help. I need you to pitch in $100, $50, $25 or whatever you can afford so we can turn this around.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ibnkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrycbdb_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

This is a major deadline and it couldn't come at a more critical time in our fight to take on Hillary Clinton in 2016. I know it doesn't seem like an issue at first, but whether or not we have a strong showing could make or break this campaign.

My opponents will be pouring over every detail of our report and we already know what will happen if we fall short of our goal. That's why I need you now: [**Jeb2016.com/September-Supporter/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wwsqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhdjwsg_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Hillary Clinton is going to spin it every way she can, the media certainly won't cut us any breaks, and Donald Trump will be attacking me on Twitter in the middle of the night, but that's nothing new and I'm not alone in that.

Friend, we only have 4 days to show that this campaign is ready to fight. [**Will you be a part of the fight by pitching in $100, $50, or even $25 right now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/uggbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjhcgfp_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**We 're running out of time and I'm counting on you. Please chip in before our deadline in 4 days: [Jeb2016.com/September-Supporter/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/gkgqskmpntrdwfwcdkhqndjfmmdjpfspqklkrpfcmktn_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you,

Jeb

subject: If you’re with Hillary before the deadline:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you step up today? | Friend --

If anyone else faced the constant barrage of insults and attacks that Hillary endures every day, they would quickly and happily squirrel away in a cabin hidden somewhere in the Rockies.

Not Hillary. Her default setting is resilience. That tenacity is why I'm proud to work on this campaign -- and proud to call Hillary a friend.

Hillary is fighting like hell -- but it won't mean a thing if we don't have the resources to run a strong campaign alongside her. **[Will you pitch in $1 right now to show Hillary you're standing with her?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM2MDczODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyODExNDM3S0&mt=2&rj=NjQyODExNDM3S0&rt=0)**

We've always known this would be a competitive primary -- and the polls are tightening as we get closer and closer to 2016. But that's definitely not slowing Hillary down and it shouldn't slow you down either.

We're about to jump into the grittiest part of this campaign. **To make sure we 're ready for whatever the Republicans throw at us, we need your support before the September 30th fundraising deadline:**

| | [**Donate**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM2MDczODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyODExNDM3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

John

subject: really bad news (Tea Party)

body:
| Friends,

The Tea Party is staging a coup in the House. Now, if they take over the Speaker's office when John Boehner retires, they could destroy middle class Americans. The stakes for winning this race could not be higher.

**And now it looks like Karl Rove 's trying to barge into the Florida Senate race to win more Tea Party seats.**

A headline in the _Sunshine State News_ says: _" Patrick Murphy, Karl Rove PAC tangle in race to replace Marco Rubio."_ And it's up to us to make sure this is a "tangle" Karl Rove will lose.

[**We 're still short of our $50,000 goal, with just 4 days to go before the end of the FEC quarter. Make a contribution right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20ac/738133e4/3a805a0b/7f8c20d9/603350727/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150926b?refcode=pme150926b_m&recurring=true")

Karl Rove is a long-time Republican strategist. Rove's group getting involved in Florida is a big indicator of what we already knew -- _**this is a huge race that could decide control of the Senate.**_

And with the Tea Party possibly gaining more power than ever before, we can't afford to let these attacks go unanswered. We NEED Patrick in the Senate.

[**Help us respond by reaching our $50,000 FEC goal before the deadline next Wednesday. Give what you can today.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20ac/738133e4/3a805a0b/7f8c20d9/603350727/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150926b?refcode=pme150926b_m&recurring=true")

I cannot overstate how important it is we reach this goal.

We'll keep you updated on our progress. In the meantime -- thanks for all of your help.
